title: Strange Plants 2
description: Strange Plants 2 is a mod that expands on Minecraft plant diversity. It adds more than just decorative plants as they can be used a food, materials, weapons, and etc.
body:
![Strange Plants 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11a82ea68b54793eddf1d03a9ed93848fb0b2c0c.png)

What is Strange Plants 2?
Strange Plants 2, the sequel/remake of Strange Plants, is a mod that expands on plant diversity in Minecraft. It adds many new and wonderful plants to make traveling through biomes more unique and colorful. There’s also new plant and garden themed blocks, new foods, and new weapons. In short, this mod adds more content to the natural aspect of Minecraft. Strange Plants 2 will be better and more refined than Strange Plants, with less incomplete features. This might mean it will take some time for new updates to come out, but they’ll be of a higher quality.

List of Plants

- Glow Lily:
  Spawns in Swamps & Mangrove Swamps
  
- Blue Lagoon:
 Spawns in Beaches,
 Crafts Blue dye
  
- Blue Riverside:
 Spawns in Rivers,
 Crafts Cyan dye
  
- Gray Drooping Flower:
 Spawns in Birch Forest,
 Crafts Gray dye
  
- Tri-Color:
 Spawns in Forests
  
- Wild White Flower:
  Spawns in Forests,
  Crafts White Dye
  
- Wild Savannah:
  Spawns in Savannahs,
  Crafts Orange Dye
  
- Winter Crystal:
  Spawns in Snowy Plains,
  Crafts Light Blue Dye
  
- Tiny Flowers:
  Spawn in Meadows,
  Craft various Dyes,
  Found in Red, Yellow, Blue, & Purple
  
- Pink Bowl:
  Spawns in Forests,
  Crafts Pink Dye
  
- Stalks:
  Spawn in Jungles,
  Craft various Dyes,
  Found in Pink, Blue, & Yellow
  
- Martian Eyes:
  Spawns in Badlands
  
- Glowshroom:
  Spawns in Lush Caves & Dripstone Caves
  
- Green Wart Shroom:
  Spawns in Swamps
  
- Witch's Hat:
  Spawns in Swamps
  
- Tallshroom:
  Spawns in Forests
  
- Tiny Tots:
  Spawns in Forests
  
- Hardstalk Grass:
  Spawns in Jungles,
  Used in crafting Hardstalk Rod
  
- Desert Tall Grass:
  Spawns in Deserts
  
- Forest Bush:
  Spawns in Forests,
  Drops Sticks
  
- Frosted Bush:
  Spawns in Snowy Plains,
  Drops Sticks
  
- Venus Fly Trap:
  Spawns in Jungles
  
- Prickly Pear Cactus:
  Spawns in Deserts,
  Yield Prickly Pear, a new food
  
- Red Cactus:
  Spawns in Badlands
  
- Flower Cacti:
  Spawn in Deserts,
  Craft various Dyes,
  Found in Red, Orange, Yellow, Light Blue, Blue, Purple, & Pink
  
List of Food

- Prickly Pear:
  Come from Prickly Pear Cactus
  
- Glass Jar:
  Used in crafting Jams
  
- Jams:
  Dandelion Jam,
  Apple Jam,
  Sweet Berry Jam,
  Prickly Pear Jam,
  
- Large Glass Bottle:
  Used in crafting Juices
  
- Juices:
  Carrot Juice,
  Melon Juice,
  Apple Juice,
  Sweet Berry Juice,
  Prickly Pear Juice

More Features

- Biomass:
  A green building block,
  Has Smooth, Small Brick, and Large Brick variations,
  Use 4 Short Grass to craft Biomass Clump,
  Smelt Biomass Clump to get Biomass Brick
  
- Silt:
  Spawns in Swamps and Mangrove Swamps,
  Used in crafting Loam
  
- Loam:
  Used in crafting Terracotta Pots
  
- Terracotta Pots:
 Come in 16 colors
  
- Spears:
  Crafted using Hardstalk Rods,
  Come in Wooden, Stone, Iron, Golden, Diamond, & Netherite
  
- Glass Cup
- Glass Mug
- Large Bowl

Q&A
Q: Can I have this mod in my own modpack?

A: Yep.

Q: Will this be ported to Neoforge or Fabric?

A: Neoforge, probably. Fabric, on the other hand, is a maybe.

Q: What mods is this compatible with?

A: It’s compatible with Better Combat!

Checkout Re-Lom Studios for sneekpeeks of new mods!
https://discord.gg/KJXt3wwdtE
